name: Priya Sharma
summary: Priya, a B.Tech graduate, details her experience at Varanasi AFSB, focusing on Pilot Aptitude Battery Test (CPSS) and psychological tests.
data: Attending the AFSB Varanasi was an exhilarating experience. Being a B.Tech student, my technical concepts were strong, which helped in the ground duty/flying branch interview. The psychological tests (TAT, WAT, SRT) require spontaneous and positive responses. I did not prepare pre-conceived stories; I just stayed true to my character. The Computerised Pilot Selection System (CPSS) is a cognitive test checking your hand-eye coordination and reflex speed. Regular video gaming actually helped! For the personal interview, be completely honest. If you do not know something, say so politely. Focus on current affairs and basic physics.
